one_time_description: Earnings from investment in Nation business entities (Xaxli'p Development Corporation) of $734,966 in 2024 vs loss of $435,293 in 2023 - significant swing; also Drinking water settlement revenue of $500,000 in prior year was non-recurring
economic_notes: Xaxli'p Development Corporation is a wholly-owned government business entity accounted for by modified equity method. Consolidated subsidiaries include Tmicw Land Holdings Ltd., Xaxli'p Community Forest Corporation, and Fountain Valley Services Society.
notes: Audit is qualified due to missing budget information (departure from Canadian PSAS requiring budget vs actual comparison). Consolidated entities: Tmicw Land Holdings Ltd., Xaxli'p Community Forest Corporation, Fountain Valley Services Society. Xaxli'p Development Corporation accounted for by modified equity method (GBE). CMHC replacement reserve underfunded by $283,277 and operating reserve underfunded by $361,546. Current liabilities calculated as accounts payable $714,308 + advances from related Nation entities $344,958 = $1,059,266. total_government_transfers includes ISC $9,529,297 + FNHA $1,304,790 + CMHC $374,319 + Province of BC $175,919 = $11,384,325. expenses_infrastructure includes Public Works $475,086 + Slide Stabilization $1,397 = $476,483. Community and Member Services $405,818, Economic Development $146,158, Resources $913,640, St'at'imc Trust $222,973 not mapped to standard categories.
